post.title: The Cost of Frictionless
post.intent_statement: Warn that automating judgment away can degrade the meaning it was meant to serve.
post.central_question: What gets removed when we remove every step?
post.core_insight: Some friction is the place where taste and intent actually live.
post.body_html:
Frictionless is not free. Each removed step also removes a moment where a human could have applied taste.

Automation without judgment scales output and flattens meaning at the same time.

The aim is not maximum speed. The aim is to spend attention on the parts that deserve it.
